sourceMovie.title: Wheels on Meals
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Wheels on Meals (1984) as a romance theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The romance and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Miss Congeniality
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wheels on Meals clicked for you, Miss Congeniality (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: City Hunter
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wheels on Meals clicked for you, City Hunter (1993) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Gone in Sixty Seconds
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wheels on Meals clicked for you, Gone in Sixty Seconds (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Wheels on Meals clicked for you, 3-Iron (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and crime, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Wheels on Meals?
faq.answer: Try Miss Congeniality, City Hunter, Gone in Sixty Seconds—each shares DNA with Wheels on Meals while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Wheels on Meals?
faq.answer: Wheels on Meals (1984) is best described as Romance, Action, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Wheels on Meals worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
